events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: unshielded rubber coupling underground vs shielded. This is non-compliant/defective. Need to select correct material: shielded mechanical coupling rated for underground/direct burial, or transition to proper materials. Unshielded rubber couplings (Fernco style) are generally not allowed underground without shield per codes. Need fail.
